qa.user_verbatim_complaint: Fix three remaining issues identified by codex assessment: (A) cross-session working tree isolation gap in changelog-analyst.md, (B) ANSI-C hex/octal escape bypass in pretool-bash-safety.sh Layer 1.F, (C) stale test stderr token in 16 test files.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: normalize_ansic_token docstring says 'return original token on any decode error' but implementation returns None (line 920). The None behavior is intentionally safer (fail-closed DENY) per dev codex consultation finding #2. Stale wording only — not a functional issue.

Compiled .pyc files in __pycache__ directories still contain binary representations of the old token 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write'. These are stale compiled artifacts from prior pytest runs and do not affect test execution (Python recompiles from source). Not a blocking issue — __pycache__ files are generated artifacts.

qa.complaint_resolution_evidence: All three codex assessment residuals are fixed: (A) stage-all fallback replaced with ABORT + scope_violation in changelog-analyst.md, orphan commit replaced with warn+skip for BULK=false. (B) normalize_ansic_token() decodes all ANSI-C escape forms before WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching. (C) 16 test files updated from old to new stderr token.

complaint_element_pointer.how_located: grep + direct file read + hook execution testing

qa.overall_assessment: All 4 acceptance criteria verified via grep, direct code inspection, and live hook execution testing. AC1: ABORT with scope_violation confirmed, old stage-all text absent. AC2: normalize_ansic_token() correctly decodes all ANSI-C escape forms; regression tests pass (7 pure-read allowed, 2 direct-write denied, 4 ANSI-C vectors denied with correct stderr token). AC3: 0 source files with old token, 16 with new token. AC4: Phase 7 orphan handling guards BULK=false with warn+skip. No band-aid patterns, no hardcode violations, no regressions. Codex adversarial consultation confirms PASS (OBSERVATION_ONLY on stale docstring wording).

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: changelog-analyst.md MUST refuse to stage files whose git diff timestamp falls outside the current session's lifetime
success_criteria_results.criterion: AC1: BULK=false no-dev-report path aborts instead of staging all
success_criteria_results.verification_method: grep for ABORT + scope_violation at lines 124-128; grep for absence of 'falling back to stage-all'
success_criteria_results.details: Lines 124-128 contain 'ABORT: no dev-report found for task <TASK_ID> — cannot enforce whitelist. Refusing to stage-all.' with structured failure JSON and scope_violation code. Old 'falling back to stage-all' text is absent from the file.
success_criteria_results.evidence: grep confirms ABORT+scope_violation present at line 126; grep for 'falling back to stage-all' returns 0 matches

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh Layer 1.F shlex tokenizer does NOT expand bash ANSI-C hex/octal escapes
success_criteria_results.criterion: AC2: normalize_ansic_token() decodes \xNN, \0NNN, \NNN, \uNNNN before WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching
success_criteria_results.verification_method: 1) Direct Python unit tests of normalize_ansic_token for all escape forms. 2) Full pipeline test ($-strip + decode + WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS match). 3) Live hook execution via subprocess with ANSI-C test vectors. 4) Regression test for pure-read and direct-write commands.
success_criteria_results.details: normalize_ansic_token correctly decodes: \x2d->'-', \055->'-', \55->'-', \u002d->'-', \U0000002d->'-'. Full pipeline: $\x2dfprint->DENY-decoded, $\055fprint->DENY-decoded, $\55fprint->DENY-decoded, $\x2ddelete->DENY-decoded. Live hook test (/tmp/qa-regression-test-20260527.py): all 4 ANSI-C vectors exit 2 with 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' in stderr. Regression: 7 pure-read pass, 2 direct-write denied. Fail-closed returns None on exception, caller treats as DENY.
success_criteria_results.evidence: python3 unit test: 11/11 decode tests pass. Live hook regression test: 13/13 pass (7 pure-read + 2 direct-write + 4 ANSI-C vectors). bash -n syntax check exit 0.

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: ~14 test files assert old token bulk-commit-auth-flag-write. Hooks now emit bulk-commit-sentinel-write
success_criteria_results.criterion: AC3: old token replaced in all 16 affected test files
success_criteria_results.verification_method: grep -rc for old token (excluding __pycache__) and new token across tests/generated/
success_criteria_results.details: grep -rl 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' tests/generated/ --include='*.py' --include='*.json' (excluding __pycache__): 0 files. grep -rl 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' tests/generated/ --include='*.py' --include='*.json' (excluding __pycache__): 16 files. All 16 expected files confirmed updated.
success_criteria_results.evidence: 0 source files with old token, 16 source files with new token. All 16 files listed in BA spec confirmed present in grep output.

success_criteria_results.evidence: grep confirms 'skipping orphan file' and 'MUST NOT be committed' at lines 335-338; old 'Commit them separately' text absent

(B) normalize_ansic_token() decodes all ANSI-C escape forms before WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching. (C) Token replacement verified across all 16 files.

regression_test_results.details: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh passes bash -n with exit code 0
cat, ls, jq, stat, wc, head, grep on sentinel path all exit 0 (pure-read allowed)
find -delete and find -exec on sentinel path exit 2 (correctly denied)
hex \x2dfprint, octal \055fprint, bare-octal \55fprint, hex \x2ddelete all exit 2 with bulk-commit-sentinel-write token in stderr

No band-aid patterns detected. All changes STRENGTHEN checks (ABORT replaces fallback, warn+skip replaces unconditional commit, normalize adds decode layer). No thresholds lowered, no checks removed, no errors swallowed.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: OBSERVATION_ONLY — codex would not overturn QA PASS. Single observation: normalize_ansic_token docstring says 'return original token on any decode error' but implementation returns None (line 920). Stale wording only; implementation is safer and matches fail-closed claim. All functional checks confirmed by codex: AC1 ABORT present, AC2 all escape vectors denied, AC3 token replacement complete, AC4 orphan warn+skip correct.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Codex observation logged as out_of_scope_observations[0]. No verdict change needed — observation is a documentation nit (stale docstring vs actual behavior), not a functional issue. The None return is intentionally safer per dev codex consultation finding #2.
